name: Encryption Response
desc: Responds to the server's encryption request with the shared secret (encrypted with the server's public key) and verify token.

fields.name: sharedSecret
fields.desc: Shared secret encrypted with server's public key

fields.name: verifyToken
fields.desc: Verify token encrypted with server's public key

implementation.overview: Responds to encryption request with encrypted secret. Modules: CrackedBypass, AuthSpoof.

modules.name: CrackedBypass
modules.purpose: Cancel encryption to stay on cracked server.
